notes: All open Repo Assist PRs (#56-59) are test coverage improvements for gh-bridge.test.ts. CI passing on all. Waiting for maintainer to review/merge. PR for this run (util function exports + 26 tests) is pending-push. Test coverage has grown significantly: baseline 152 tests; PRs add ~65 more tests total. No user-created bugs found in any run — all open issues are Repo Assist tracking items. One area to investigate: getRecentRepos uses {owner} placeholder which may not work in desktop context. Future: add tests for generateRecap/runAIModel if possible.
